name: ProjetoFinal
description: Final Project of Web Class

name: AccountingSystem
description: This application allows users to manage accounts, perform transfers, calculate interest, and display account information.

name: AdvancedOOP-CGS
description: The project involves developing a Computerized Gallery System (CGS) for tracking artworks in a private art gallery. The system is designed to keep track of each artwork from the time it enters the system and is intended to run on a single computer.

name: AdvancedOOP-Exercises
description: Practice exercises for Advanced Object Oriented Programming course.

name: AdvancedOOP-Midterm-SchoolSystem
description: School system developed for course midterm with the functionality of adding students and teachers.

name: AdvancedOOP-Quiz3
description: Quiz 3 for Advanced Object Oriented Class. It's a simple class that converts an array to a list.

name: AdvancedOOP-Quiz4-TxtFile
description: Quiz 4: Implement a java project with GUI and read a text file & show the content in a messagebox, or textbox, label, etc.

name: Android-FirstAssignment
description: First assignment developed in Android Mobile course with the objective of developing familiarity with Android UI Layout Managers.

name: BethanysPieShop
description: ASP .NET Core application designed for a fictional pie store developed as part of Plural Sight's ASP.NET Core Fundamentals course.

name: BethanysPieShopAdmin
description: ASP .NET Core web application designed as the administration module for a fictional pie store developed as part of Plural Sight's "Building a Data-driven ASP.NET Core Application with EF Core" course.

name: CityInfoAPI
description: CityInfo API is a web API designed to provide detailed information about various cities and their points of interest. This project was developed as part of the ASP.NET Core Web API Fundamentals course by Plural Sight.

name: codeblock
description: Final Project for Web Server Applications course.

name: EduPlus
description: EduPlus is a minimal viable product (MVP) for managing teachers and video lectures in an educational streaming platform. Built using ASP.NET MVC, SQL Server, and ADO.NET for data access, it allows users to assign, view, and manage lectures associated with teachers, ensuring efficient content management for educators.

name: FirebaseLogin
description: A simple Android application that demonstrates Firebase Authentication using Email/Password sign-up and login. This project is built in Java using Android Studio and integrates Firebase Authentication to handle user registration and login functionality.

name: GroceryManager
description: Grocery Manager is an Android application designed to help users manage their grocery items with ease. Users can add, update, and delete grocery items, categorized into various groups such as Fruits, Dairy, Vegetables, Meat, and Beverages. The app uses Firebase Authentication for user management and SQLite for local data storage.

name: HollywoodStars
description: A web application built with ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server for managing actors and their movie associations.

name: LINQ-Practice
description: LINQ Data Transformation Exercises: Implementing various LINQ methods and query syntax to transform and analyze data in .NET collections.

name: MultiTier-HiTechDistributionManagementSystem
description: A multi-tier Windows Forms application for managing inventory and orders at Hi-Tech Distribution Inc.
